title: Design a URL Shortener
input_format: Long URLs to shorten and short URLs to resolve
output_format: Shortened URLs and redirect targets with analytics
constraints: Must handle 100M URLs. Short codes must be 6-8 characters. Must support custom aliases. Must handle 10K reads/second. Must track click analytics.
function_signature: class URLShortener { shorten(url: string, customAlias?: string): Promise<ShortenResult>; resolve(shortCode: string): Promise<string>; getAnalytics(shortCode: string): Promise<Analytics>; }
